quote: The diligence process was thorough without being adversarial. They found real problems, priced them fairly, and closed on time. Rare combination.
name: Sarah K.

quote: They took board seats and actually showed up. Strategy, accountability, and a network that opened doors we couldn't open ourselves.
name: James T.

quote: We thought selling meant losing control. They structured it so the management team stayed intact and upside was preserved. Exactly what we needed.
name: David L.
